title: 04548_Position_AI-Powered_Autonomous_Weapons_Risk_Geopolitical_Instability_and_Threaten_AI_Research
positive_examples: Spurring awareness and constructive discussion about the impacts of AWS.
Encouraging further analysis and debate on the impacts of AWS by ML and policy researchers worldwide.
negative_examples: Risk of encouraging ML researchers to become more active in advancing AWS technology.
AWS are already being recklessly developed and deployed, which poses risks to society.
Potential for AWS to escalate geopolitical tensions and conflict risk.
